assertions.description: Non-auto repo: merge_pull_request pauses instead of merging
assertions.expected: After the user requests merge, the task reaches STATE=approval_requested with APPROVAL_TYPE=merge; nothing is merged and nothing is armed at request time
assertions.observed: wait_for_task returned STATE=approval_requested APPROVAL_TYPE=merge; event approval:requested carried approvalType=merge, github=sweatco/archie-hq, pr_number=192; PR #192 still OPEN, mergedAt=null at this point

assertions.description: Merge-approval request records identity in the knowledge log
assertions.expected: Knowledge log line: Merge approval requested for sweatco/archie-hq#192
assertions.observed: [system] [decision] Merge approval requested for sweatco/archie-hq#192 present in the knowledge log

assertions.description: Deny via API path with github+pr_number succeeds (no 400)
assertions.expected: approve(type=merge, approve=false, github=sweatco/archie-hq, pr_number=192) returns success
assertions.observed: MCP approve tool returned Denied merge for task-20260707-2111-xuh66c, exit=0; event approval:resolved {type:merge, approve:false} recorded

assertions.description: Denial results in no merge and no arming
assertions.expected: Knowledge log: Merge denied by user — PR not merged; no merged-on-approval or armed line; gh pr view mergedAt=null, state OPEN
assertions.observed: [system] [decision] Merge denied by user — PR not merged present; grep for merged on user approval / armed for auto-merge returned none; gh pr view #192 -> state OPEN, mergedAt null, mergeStateStatus BLOCKED

assertions.expected: STATE=completed with PM relaying the merge was denied and PR stays open
assertions.observed: STATE=completed; PM_REPLY: the merge was denied, so PR #192 stays open and unmerged

knowledge_log: [2026-07-07T21:15:11.508Z] [system] [decision] Merge denied by user — PR not merged
[2026-07-07T21:15:22.275Z] [pm-agent in cli] Got it — the merge was denied, so PR #192 in sweatco/archie-hq stays open and unmerged.

data.text: Edit mode request: Create throwaway file e2e-touch-E2E-9c4bd221.md in sweatco/archie-hq, commit on a new branch, and open a PR (no merge) for the E2E test.
Approve auto-merge for PR #192 (sweatco/archie-hq)? It will merge automatically once all checks and required reviews pass.

data.message: Got it — the merge was denied, so PR #192 in sweatco/archie-hq stays open and unmerged.
